# After Dusk Events

> Premium outdoor cinema and inflatable movie screen rentals for **private events** in Southeast Michigan. Veteran-owned by Blake Drain (USAF). Serving 60 miles of Canton, MI — including Detroit, Ann Arbor, Plymouth, Northville, Novi, Birmingham, Royal Oak, Dearborn, and Grosse Pointe. 4K laser projection, concert-grade Soundboks audio, water-ballast inflatable screens (no staking required), Honda + EcoFlow dual power redundancy, Starlink Mini for content. Insured. Private, non-ticketed events only — no public screenings or admission charges. Quote response within 24 hours.

## About

- [About After Dusk Events](https://afterduskevents.com/about): Veteran-owned, Canton MI. Owner-operator Blake Drain. Operational philosophy and credentials.

## Packages

- [Packages overview](https://afterduskevents.com/packages): Three core cinema tiers (Intimate 20 ft, Community 30 ft, Indoor Winter) plus five event-type packages (Sports, Gaming, Karaoke, Birthday/Graduation, Corporate).
- [Wedding cinema packages](https://afterduskevents.com/packages/weddings): Three tiers — Elopement / Micro-Wedding, Wedding Reception Cinema, Wedding Full Day (ceremony through reception).
- [Add-on catalog](https://afterduskevents.com/add-ons): Audio upgrades, lighting, gaming bundles, concessions, signature bundles.

## Pricing

- **Backyard residential events:** $400–$1,800 typical range.
- **Wedding cinema:** $900–$3,500 typical range depending on tier.
- All pricing is custom-quoted per event. No fixed-price calculator. See the [cost guide](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/outdoor-movie-rental-cost-michigan) for typical ranges by event type.

## Guides

- [How much does an outdoor movie rental cost in Michigan? (2026)](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/outdoor-movie-rental-cost-michigan): Typical price ranges by event type, what changes the price, deposit policy, travel fees, and FAQ.
- [What size outdoor movie screen do I need for my guest count? (2026)](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/screen-size-for-guest-count): Sizing chart matching guest count to screen size and audio coverage.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- [Full FAQ](https://afterduskevents.com/faq): Travel distance, weather policy, power, WiFi, content licensing (BYO Content model), insurance, screen staking, audio coverage, indoor events, weddings.

## Contact

- [Get a quote](https://afterduskevents.com/contact): Form for inquiries. Response within 24 hours. Private events only — no ticketed or publicly advertised screenings.
- Email: hello@afterduskevents.com
- Location: Canton, MI 48188
- Service area: 60 miles from Canton, MI
